content.en:
The Soul Saint Realm Flower had already been refined, and Ye Tian had ended his retreat.

In the following days, Ye Tian entered the Battle Realm Tower and tried to have a discussion with some of the strongest domain ancestors of the Battle Gate.

Of course, he would not reveal his true strength, and only competed with a few Supreme Domain Ancestors, and roughly confirmed his strength through competition.

According to the calculation of real strength, Ye Tian can easily kill the powerhouse of the first grade of the Supreme Domain Ancestor, but it is impossible to calculate how many places he is on the Battle Gate Supreme Strength List.

Almost all of the Supreme Domain Ancestors on the Battle Gate Supreme Strength List were in the outside world, working hard to impact the Holy Soul, and they would hardly enter the Battle Realm Tower, so he couldn't find the Supreme Domain Ancestors on the Supreme Strength List to learn from.

The only one he found was the Herring Fish Domain Ancestor, but it was naturally a little bad for him to directly seek advice from the Herring Fish Domain Ancestor.

He couldn't just come to the door and ask the Qingyu Domain Ancestor to discuss with him, the two of them were not familiar with each other, so saying this would undoubtedly be regarded as a provocation.

Moreover, when it comes to the level of the Supreme Domain Ancestor, it is not beneficial for oneself to compete with each other, and it does not have the effect of training, and it is easy for others to know their strength.

And the Battle Realm Tower does not have an assessment for the level of the Supreme Domain Ancestor, and the half-step Domain Ancestor level can also understand its own strength through the Ninefold Battle Realm of the Battle Realm Tower.

But the Supreme Domain Ancestor is too powerful, and it is difficult for the Battle Boundary Tower to simulate the strength of the Supreme Domain Ancestor above the first grade, after all, the Battle Realm Tower is just a holy relic, and it is not so against the sky.

At this time, Ye Tian really hoped that someone would attack him, so that he could understand his strength.

--------------------

Daoshan Realm, in the middle of an ordinary realm.

There is a world in which a group of domain ancestors gathered, all wearing black battle armor and white bone masks, and the word ghost was engraved on their battle robes.

If someone familiar saw this scene, they would immediately recognize the identity of this group of people, and they were members of the Dark Sanctuary Ghost Fox Organization.

The Ghost Fox organization has not been recognized by the Ten Holy Gates of the Dark Sacred Domain, and it does not belong to the sect, let alone the Holy Land, but their strength is not weak.

It is rumored that the strength of the Ghost Fox organization is no less than that of a weak holy land, with some invincible domain ancestors, and even a peerless domain ancestor.

And there are many Ghost Fox's strongest domain ancestors, and each realm is divided into bronze, silver, gold, diamond, and a total of six levels of membership levels such as master and king.

For example, the ordinary domain ancestor is the six levels of one-star bronze to the one-star king, the elite domain ancestor is the six levels of two-star bronze to the two-star king, the top domain ancestor is the six levels of three-star bronze to the three-star king, and the strongest domain ancestor is specifically divided into six levels of four-star bronze and four-star king.

The four-star bronze represents the general Supreme Domain Ancestor, the four-star silver represents the very powerful top Supreme Domain Ancestor, and the four-star gold represents the third-grade Supreme Domain Ancestor, and the four-star diamond represents the second-grade Supreme Domain Ancestor.

The four-star master is awesome, representing the first-grade Supreme Domain Ancestor, how powerful this Supreme Domain Ancestor is.

As for the four-star king, it is comparable to the strongest domain ancestor on the Holy Gate Supreme List.

It stands to reason that it is difficult for ordinary forces to give birth to the strongest domain ancestors on the Holy Gate Supreme Strength List, and even the Holy Land has at most one or two such Supreme Domain Ancestors, and there may not even be such a Supreme Domain Ancestor.

However, the Ghost Fox Organization has a four-star king-level Supreme Domain Ancestor, and there are not just one or two, but many.

It is rumored that the Ghost Fox Organization has a very precious treasure that helps the Supreme Domain Ancestor to condense the soul holy light, which is able to cultivate so many four-star king-level.

It stands to reason that the Ghost Fox Organization has such a heavy treasure, it should not be able to keep it, and the Holy Gate can easily destroy the Ghost Fox Organization.

However, the Ghost Fox Organization has a slight relationship with an ancestor, so it has a background, and even the Holy Gate will not destroy the Ghost Fox Organization.

The Ghost Fox organization often takes on some missions, including assassination missions.

Under normal circumstances, the Ghost Fox Organization would not go to assassinate the Domain Ancestor of the Holy Gate.

But this time, they took on the task.

At this time, presiding over this meeting were the four-star king of the ghost fox, the Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor, and the four-star king, the Dark Shadow Domain Ancestor.

In addition to these two four-star kings, there are seven four-star master-level members, twelve four-star diamond-level members, and numerous bronze, silver, and gold-level members.

I have to say that this force is very powerful, and it can easily sweep through an ordinary sect.

After all, some ordinary grandmasters only have one or two invincible domain ancestors, while four-star kings have the strength to kill ordinary invincible domain ancestors.

It can be said that these domain ancestors are comparable to the power of a sect.

At this time.

The Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor and the Dark Ghost Domain Ancestor were discussing their next plan - assassinating Ye Tian.

"The organization has issued a mission, that is, to assassinate the Lord of the Xuanxu Saint Realm, the former First Holy Son of the Battle Gate, and now the Supreme Domain Ancestor, the Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor!"

The Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor spoke.

At this time, another four-star master asked: "Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor, why did the organization want us to assassinate the strongest domain ancestor of the Battle Gate, that is the Holy Gate Domain Ancestor, and it is also one of the high-level leaders, once we anger the Battle Gate, then we ......"

"This is an order from the organization, and there must be a number of forces that have issued this mission, and it may even be a mission issued by other Holy Gates. In short, the organization actually issued this mission to us, and we are not afraid of the battle. "

Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestral Dao.

"The Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain is a Holy Endower, we are not afraid of the Battle Gate, aren't we afraid of the Ancestor Parents behind him?" another four-star master asked.

At this time, the Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor's face turned heavy.

I have to say that he is indeed afraid of the first ancestor.

Once Ye Tian was really killed and the ancestor was introduced, they would definitely die, and even the Ghost Fox Organization would not be able to keep it.

But the Ghost Fox Organization still issued this task and also provided a message.

The Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor immediately told the information of the Ghost Fox Organization: "The organization provides a message, the Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain may not be the heir of the First Ancestor, he was born with a holy endowment, and it may be one of the miracles of the Dark Forbidden Domain, so we will not provoke the Ancestor by assassinating the Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain!"

In fact, the Ghost Shadow Domain Ancestor still had a guess in his heart.

That is, the ghost fox organization has two purposes, one is to create chaos, and the other is to tempt, or the temptation of many forces, to see if there is an ancestor behind Ye Tian.

The people of the Holy Gate did not dare to make a move, and the Holy Land did not have the courage to make a move, so they naturally found their Ghost Fox Organization.

The Ghost Fox Organization is famous for its hidden methods, even if it really angers the Ghost Fox Organization, the Ghost Fox Organization changes its name and gives up part of its strength, there is still hope that it will be preserved and will not be completely wiped out by the ancestors.

But these domain ancestors are afraid that they will become cannon fodder, and they will definitely die.

But this is the order of the organization, and they don't dare to disobey it, otherwise once they defect to the organization, once the organization leaks their information to other forces, I don't know how many people want to kill them, and they will die at that time.

Therefore, they had to copy it and attack Ye Tian.
